fato_historico: 2006: The 7.7 Mw Pangandaran tsunami earthquake severely affects the Indonesian island of Java, killing 668 people, and leaving more than 9,000 injured.
energia_do_dia: Today invites you to find stillness within the shifting tides of life. Just as the powerful waters once reshaped distant shores, your emotional resilience may now be moving mountains. It is a good time to ground yourself, nurture your ambitious spirit, and remember that even after the deepest waves, life blooms with hope and renewed four-leaf clover luck.
frase_do_dia: Even the calmest waters hold the strength to build a brighter future for you.
significado_numero: Represents the awakening of your hidden potential and inner spiritual growth.
conselho: Consider pausing to breathe deeply and trust in your capacity to heal.
